This genus is classified within the order Hymenoptera, a group that includes sawflies, bees, wasps, and ants. Rhamphidia ovalifolia is further categorized within the superorder Endopterygota, which comprises insects with a complete metamorphosis. The classification of Rhamphidia ovalifolia reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other insects.
